zh.lifeSummary: 當Deolifard Oliphant於1142年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷度福斯時，她的父親David Olifard28歲，母親Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard33歲。她於1159年與William Murray of Sutherland在英國蘇格蘭莫雷度福斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1203年在她的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deolifard Oliphant于1142年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷度福斯时，她的父亲David Olifard28岁，母亲Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard33岁。她于1159年与William Murray of Sutherland在英国苏格兰莫雷度福斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1203年在她的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Oliphant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London) and Scottish (Fife): from Old French olifard or olifant, of uncertain meaning. It has been suggested that this might be a derivative of Old French olif ‘olive’ + the pejorative suffix -ard ‘derisive nickname for one who preferred an olive branch to more martial weapons’; it may have denoted a man twisted like an olive-tree. The variant Olifant may have resulted from the substitution in Old Norman French of the sequence l-r by l-n, leading to a false association with Old French olifant ‘elephant’. This heraldic beast appears in the Scottish family's coats of arms. Branches of the Anglo-Norman family owned lands in both England and Scotland. The surname is now chiefly Scottish.
English: possibly a topographic name from residence at an inn known as the Olyphaunt or ‘elephant’, though whether this gave rise to a hereditary surname is unknown.

en.lifeSummary: When Deolifard Oliphant was born in 1142, in Duffus, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, David Olifard, was 28 and her mother, Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard, was 33. She married William Murray of Sutherland in 1159, in Duffus, Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1203, in her hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Deolifard Oliphant est née en 1142, à Duffus, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Olifard, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Murray of Sutherland en 1159, à Duffus, Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1203, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Deolifard Oliphant 1142 in Duffus, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Olifard 28 und ihre Mutter Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard 33. Sie hat 1159 in Duffus, Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom William Murray of Sutherland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1203 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Deolifard Oliphant è nata il nel 1142 nel Duffus, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, David Olifard, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William Murray of Sutherland nel 1159, nel Duffus, Moray, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1203, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Deolifard Oliphantが1142年にイギリススコットランドモーアイダフウスで生まれた時，父David Olifardは28歳，母Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifardは33歳であった。1159年にイギリススコットランドモーアイダフウスでWilliam Murray of Sutherlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1203年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Deolifard Oliphant(이)가 1142년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 더프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Olifard(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1159년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이 더프스에서 William Murray of Sutherland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1203년 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Deolifard Oliphant nasceu em 1142, em Duffus, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Olifard, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William Murray of Sutherland em 1159, em Duffus, Moray, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1203, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deolifard Oliphant родилась в 1142 г. в местности дуффус, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени David Olifard было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Murray of Sutherland в 1159 г. в местности дуффус, мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1203 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Deolifard Oliphant nació en 1142, en Duffus, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, David Olifard, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan de Cadella or Calder of Calder Olifard, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William Murray of Sutherland en 1159, en Duffus, Moray, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1203, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
